results.question: Find a recipe for a healthy avocado salad on Allrecipes that has a preparation time of less than 20 minutes and more than 30 user reviews. Include the nutritional information per serving.

Here is a complete summary of the healthy avocado salad recipe found on Allrecipes that meets all the criteria:

---

## 🥑 Avocado Salad — Allrecipes
**🔗 Source:** [allrecipes.com](https://www.allrecipes.com/recipe/14744/avocado-salad/)

---

### ✅ Recipe Qualifications Met:
| Criteria | Status |
|---|---|
| Prep Time < 20 minutes | ✅ **15 minutes** |
| More than 30 user reviews | ✅ **248 reviews** (4.7 ⭐ rating, 340 ratings) |

---

### ⏱️ Time & Servings
- **Prep Time:** 15 minutes
- **Total Time:** 15 minutes
- **Servings:** 6

---

### 🛒 Ingredients
- 3 avocados, peeled, pitted, and cubed
- 1 pint cherry tomatoes, halved
- 1 cucumber, cubed
- 1 small red onion, diced
- ¼ cup chopped fresh cilantro
- 3 tablespoons olive oil
- 2 tablespoons lime juice (or red wine vinegar)
- Salt and black pepper to taste

---

### 👨‍🍳 Directions
1. **Combine** avocados, tomatoes, cucumber, and red onion in a large bowl.
2. **Whisk together** olive oil and lime juice in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
3. **Drizzle** the dressing over the salad and gently toss to combine. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve.

> 💡 **Cook's Note:** Have fun customizing this avocado salad with your favorite add-ins such as sliced jalapeños and corn.

---

### 🥗 Nutrition Facts (Per Serving)

| Nutrient | Amount | % Daily Value |
|---|---|---|
| **Calories** | 126 | — |
| **Total Fat** | 10g | 13% |
| **Saturated Fat** | 2g | 8% |
| **Sodium** | 9mg | 0% |
| **Total Carbohydrate** | 10g | 4% |
| **Dietary Fiber** | 6g | **20%** |
| **Total Sugars** | 3g | — |
| **Protein** | 2g | 4% |
| **Vitamin C** | 30mg | **33%** |
| **Calcium** | 20mg | 2% |
| **Iron** | 1mg | 3% |
| **Potassium** | 474mg | **10%** |

> *Percent Daily Values are based on a 2,000 calorie diet.*

---

### 🌟 Why It's Healthy:
- ✅ **Only 126 calories** per serving
- ✅ **High in Dietary Fiber** (6g / 20% DV) — great for digestion
- ✅ **Rich in Vitamin C** (33% DV) — boosts immunity
- ✅ **Good source of Potassium** (474mg / 10% DV) — supports heart health
- ✅ **Very low in Sodium** (only 9mg) — heart-friendly
- ✅ **No added sugars**, just 3g of natural sugars
- ✅ Avocados provide **healthy monounsaturated fats**

This recipe has been made by **854 home cooks** on Allrecipes and is a quick, no-cook, nutritious salad perfect for any meal!
